name: cj-mcp-app
description: CJ Dropshipping MCP Server with AI-driven operations
author: 东咸

scripts.clear-token: node -e "const f=require('path').join(require('os').homedir(),'.cj-mcp-token');try{require('fs').unlinkSync(f);console.log('✅ Token cleared: '+f);}catch(e){console.log('ℹ️  No token file found: '+f);}"
scripts.gen:cert: mkdir -p certs && openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:2048 -keyout certs/key.pem -out certs/cert.pem -days 365 -nodes -subj '/CN=dongxian.com' -addext 'subjectAltName=DNS:dongxian.com,DNS:localhost,IP:127.0.0.1' && echo '✅ 证书已生成到 certs/ 目录，CN=dongxian.com，有效期 365 天'
scripts.start:ngrok: CJ_TRANSPORT=http CJ_ENV=production CJ_HTTP_PORT=3009 node dist/mcp-server/index.cjs & sleep 1 && ngrok http 3009
